name: Farmers & Merchants Bancshares, Inc.
summary: General Farmers and Merchants Bancshares, Inc. is a Maryland corporation chartered on August 8, 2016 that is registered with the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (the Federal Reserve) as a bank holding company under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended (the BHC Act).
